name: @16xbrains/gateway-core
description: 16xGateway — self-hosted security sidecar that masks PII before untrusted plugin code sees it and restores real values afterward.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build --workspace @16xbrains/gateway-client && npm run build --workspace @16xbrains/plugin-sdk
scripts.test:core: node --test dist/tests/sanitizer.test.js dist/tests/policy.test.js dist/tests/registry.test.js dist/tests/config.test.js dist/tests/pipeline.test.js
